description: exrex is a tool to generate all matching strings to a given regular expression. Useful for fuzzing.

documentation.how_to_use: Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `cd toolboxes/exrex && python3 exrex.py --target $KFIOSA_TARGET_HOST`. Further invocations from upstream: `cd toolboxes/exrex && python3 exrex.py --help`; `cd toolboxes/exrex && python3 exrex.py --help`. Generate strings from regex.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the utility category. Fits when the engagement needs: Generate strings from regex.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool because: Generate strings from regex.

name: exrex
